name: 4q35_subtelomeric_SD
description: 4q35 subtelomeric SD block distal to the D4Z4 array. Contains a >40 kb subtelomeric duplicon shared with 10q26 (~98% identity) plus shorter copies on other acrocentric and telomeric ends. The 4qA/4qB haplotype divergence (pLAM and SSLP) sits inside this SD and determines FSHD1 permissiveness.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric duplicon shared with 10qter at ~98% identity; contains the pLAM region (DUX4 3'UTR polyA signal), the 4qA/4qB SSLP, and TUBB4Q pseudogene; degenerate (TTAGGG)n telomere boundary at the distal end.
